name: Suite Round-2 — Fix Verification (2026-05-28)
description: 12 cases that lock in the Round 2 fixes: temporal year-anchoring (Q1 2027 / Feb 2019), embedding-fallback SQL path for non-embedded entities, multi-table Phase 06 joins, FK-edge weighting, Arabic synonym resolution. Designed to catch regressions before they propagate. Run after every meaningful change to SchemaInferenceGenerator / SemanticLayer / InjectTemporalFilterFromQuestionPhase / fk-role-patterns.

Scenarios.Question: How many bills issued in Q1 2025?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Bills WHERE IssuedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(2025,1,1) AND IssuedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(2025,4,1)
Scenarios._note: Year-qualified quarter must produce explicit DATEFROMPARTS(2025,...) — NOT YEAR(GETDATE()).

Scenarios.Question: How many tickets in Q1 2025 vs Q1 2026?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(2025,1,1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(2025,4,1) UNION ALL SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(2026,1,1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(2026,4,1)
Scenarios._note: Multi-year period comparison must use TWO distinct year ranges (UNION ALL), not collapse to current year.

Scenarios.Question: tickets created in February 2026
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM Tickets WHERE CreatedAt >= DATEFROMPARTS(2026,2,1) AND CreatedAt < DATEFROMPARTS(2026,3,1) AND IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: Year-qualified month — must NOT use current-year start.

Scenarios.Question: work orders about transformer
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM WorkOrders WHERE (TitleEn LIKE '%transformer%' OR Description LIKE '%transformer%' OR ResolutionNotes LIKE '%transformer%')
Scenarios._note: WorkOrders has no embeddings — must route to SQL LIKE on SearchableColumns, not refuse.

Scenarios.Question: payments matching cash
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT * FROM Payments WHERE (ExternalTransactionId LIKE '%cash%' OR Notes LIKE '%cash%')
Scenarios._note: Payments has no embeddings + searchable text columns — SQL fallback.

Scenarios.Question: tickets about gas leak
Scenarios._note: Tickets HAS embeddings — must route to semantic vector search, not the SQL fallback.

Scenarios.Question: How many service accounts are active?
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ServiceAccounts WHERE Status = 'Active'
Scenarios._note: Phase 06 entity (synthesized from schema-inferred) — confirms auto-synthesis path.

Scenarios.Question: total payments collected this month
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT SUM(AmountInBase) FROM Payments WHERE PaidAt >= DATEADD(month,DATEDIFF(month,0,GETDATE()),0) AND PaidAt < DATEADD(month,1,DATEADD(month,DATEDIFF(month,0,GETDATE()),0))
Scenarios._note: Confirms PaidAt → 'paid' DateRole + 'this month' temporal expansion + SUM aggregation.

Scenarios.Question: list payments and their customer names
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT p.PaymentReference, c.FullNameEn FROM Payments p JOIN Bills b ON b.Id = p.BillId JOIN Customers c ON c.Id = b.CustomerId
Scenarios._note: Multi-hop join Payments → Bills → Customers — exercises the FK-edge weighting (Bill.CustomerId is cheaper than CreatedByUserId).

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد أوامر العمل المفتوحة؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM WorkOrders WHERE Status = 'Open'
Scenarios._note: Arabic for WorkOrders + status — confirms the Arabic synonym layer (أوامر العمل) added to schema-overrides.json resolves.

Scenarios.Question: كم عدد الفنيين النشطين؟
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Technicians WHERE IsActive = 1
Scenarios._note: Arabic for Technicians (الفنيين) — confirms Phase 06 Arabic synonyms.

Scenarios.Question: how many open tickets
Scenarios.ExpectedSql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM Tickets t JOIN TicketStatuses s ON s.Id = t.StatusId WHERE s.Name = 'Open' AND t.IsDeleted = 0
Scenarios._note: Pure regression check — the canonical question that the 94.3% baseline includes. Must still pass after all Round 2 changes.
